mapper.select:
select o.p_sNo,o.coupon_price,o.coupon_id,o.otype,o.self_lifting,d.id,d.r_sNo,d.user_id,d.p_id,d.p_name,d.p_price,d.num,d.r_status,d.sid,d.size,p.imgurl,o.otype ,o.ptcode ,p.product_class,b.brand_name,c.costprice,c.price,c.img, d.deliver_num, p.mch_id from lkt_order_details as d left join lkt_configure as c on d.sid = c.id right join lkt_product_list as p on p.id=c.pid left join lkt_order as o on d.r_sNo=o.sNo left join lkt_brand_class as b on p.brand_id = b.brand_id
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select count(1) from lkt_order_details as d left join lkt_configure as c on d.sid = c.id left join lkt_product_list as p on p.id=c.pid left join lkt_order as o on d.r_sNo=o.sNo left join lkt_brand_class as b on p.brand_id = b.brand_id
